meaning: n.[国名] 罗马尼亚(欧洲巴尔干半岛东北部国家)
examples: Romania badly needs aid to modernize its outmoded industries.
In 1918 the Romanian majority in this former czarist province voted for union with Romania.
The wildlife in Romania isn't well protected.
Traynor's club colleague David Young will now travel to join the Scotland A squad in Romania.
Five of the 27 EU countries do not recognise Kosovo: Spain, Greece, Romania, Slovakia and Cyprus.
